seo.title: Muhammed Alsayed - Projects
seo.description: Explore the diverse portfolio of Muhammed Alsayed, a front-end web developer. View my featured projects built with various technologies like Vue, Nuxt, TailwindCSS, and more.

projects.title: Building Interfaces, Bringing Ideas to Life.
projects.description: I've worked on a variety of projects, from simple websites to complex web applications. Here are a few of my favorites.

items.title: LibyanaHub Platform
items.description: A comprehensive e-learning and fitness coaching platform for the Libyan market. Features course enrollment, fitness coach subscriptions with tiered pricing, admin dashboard, and full Arabic/English bilingual support with RTL layout.

items.title: LibyanaHub Collab
items.description: A core module of the LibyanaHub platform born from a collaboration between Libyana and medical students to track and monitor patient health. Provides patient record management, medical history tracking, and streamlined communication between healthcare providers through a powerful admin panel.

items.title: Orders Management System
items.description: A full-featured business order and invoice management system. Covers the complete order lifecycle from customer and product management to invoice generation with PDF export, payment tracking, and real-time financial analytics.

items.title: Elzwetina Group
items.description: Corporate website for Libya's leading industrial and safety solutions provider. A full-stack Laravel app with product showcase, brand partnerships, client portfolio, contact system with email notifications, and a Filament-powered admin panel.

items.title: Alkhidmat Albarmajia
items.description: A modern, responsive website for a Libyan tech services company. Built as a freelancer using Astro with a custom Vue component, showcasing their programming, IT solutions, and electronic equipment services.

items.title: Weather Now
items.description: Real-time weather app with a clean, responsive interface. Search locations worldwide, view current conditions, browse 7-day forecasts, and explore hourly temperature trends with metric/imperial unit support.

items.title: Libya Roots
items.description: A tourism platform showcasing Libya’s cultural and historical landmarks. Users can explore categorized destinations, view locations on interactive maps, and save favorites for trip planning.

items.title: Telegram News Bot
items.description: An automated Telegram bot that aggregates financial and forex news from multiple RSS feeds, translates articles into Arabic using the Lingva API, and delivers them to a Telegram channel with images and read-more links. Uses MongoDB to track sent articles and avoid duplicates, with automatic cleanup and rate-limit handling.

items.title: Zad Al-muslim
items.description: An Islamic resource platform offering Quran recitations, Islamic radio stations, and educational lessons. Provides easy access to spiritual resources with a user-friendly interface.

items.title: Easy Bank
items.description: A responsive landing page built with vanilla JavaScript and TailwindCSS. Created as a Frontend Mentor challenge to sharpen my Tailwind skills.

items.title: Movie App
items.description: A movie browsing app built with Vue as my first Vue project. Features data fetching from an API, Vue Router navigation, and Pinia state management.
